evaluations.query: Validate that all counts are consistent across OrchestKit
expected_behavior: Runs scripts/validate-counts.sh from repo root to check all count sources
Compares skill, hook, and agent counts from src/ vs CLAUDE.md and manifests
Outputs a comparison table showing all sources agree
Reports 'All counts consistent.' with no drift flags

evaluations.query: Check if counts are up to date after I added a new hook
expected_behavior: Detects hook count in CLAUDE.md Project Overview does not match hooks.json entry count
Flags drift with exact file and field reference (e.g., CLAUDE.md:line 5 says 87, found 88)
Outputs comparison table row showing src/ count vs CLAUDE.md count
Suggests updating CLAUDE.md Project Overview and Version section to match

evaluations.query: Validate counts — I just added a skill to src/skills/ but haven't rebuilt yet
expected_behavior: Uses src/ filesystem as authoritative source, not plugins/
Detects skill count mismatch between src/skills/ directories and manifest array length
Flags drift with precise reference to manifests/ork.json skills array
Uses only manifests/ork.json — no alias manifests exist in v7

evaluations.query: CLAUDE.md Project Overview seems wrong, validate all counts
expected_behavior: Reads CLAUDE.md Project Overview to extract stated skill, agent, and hook counts
Reads manifests/ork.json to compare declared counts
Identifies which specific count in CLAUDE.md is stale
Outputs flags for each mismatched field with file:field location for easy correction

evaluations.query: Validate counts but src/skills/ directory is completely empty
expected_behavior: Reports 0 skills found in src/skills/ and flags a massive drift against CLAUDE.md and manifest counts
Does not treat an empty directory as a passing state when manifests declare non-zero skill counts
Warns that this likely indicates a broken checkout or accidentally deleted source files

evaluations.query: Validate counts but manifests/ork.json has a JSON syntax error and cannot be parsed
expected_behavior: Reports the JSON parse error with the specific line and character position from the parser
Does not silently skip manifest validation or report counts as 0 due to the parse failure
Suggests fixing the JSON syntax error in manifests/ork.json before re-running count validation

evaluations.query: Total hooks count matches but global vs agent-scoped vs skill-scoped subcategory counts are wrong in CLAUDE.md
expected_behavior: Validates subcategory counts individually rather than only checking the total hook count
Flags drift in specific subcategories even when the aggregate total happens to match
Reports which subcategory (global, agent-scoped, or skill-scoped) is off and by how many
